notableEvents.label: TJ Rumfield pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: TJ Rumfield singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Drew Gilbert. Cole Carrigg scores.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Hunter Goodman challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Willy Adames steals (2) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert grounds out, second baseman Willi Castro to first baseman Troy Johnston. Willy Adames to 3rd.
